title: 有馬記念の後に・惜敗と稲妻

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having lost to Super Creek in the Arima Kinen,
Oguri Cap vows to defeat her next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Tamamo Cross visits the waiting
room and declares she's postponing competing
for the Dream Trophy in order to face off against
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The appearance of an unexpected rival marks the
start of a new period of training for Oguri Cap.
